name: Seshat the Silent-Eyed
dialogue: Few who reach this hall remember why they came.
The sun erases names. The wind unmakes the path. Only the careful arrive.
This is the Trial of Wisdom. I will not crush you. I will let you crush yourself.
Watch your choices, trainer. The mirror watches with me.
preBattleLine: Seshat closes her eyes. Her party already knows your weaknesses.
postDefeatDialogue: Seshat opens her eyes one at a time. They are not the eyes she started with.
"You read the wind. The Pharaoh writes your name in it."
She bows once. The sandstorm in the corner of the room settles to a whisper.
